name: xapp
description: xApp event handling nodes for Cognigy.AI — route flow execution based on xApp submit and custom inject events

scripts.build: npm run transpile && npm run lint && npm run zip
scripts.zip: tar cfz $npm_package_name-$npm_package_version.tar.gz build/* package.json package-lock.json README.md icon.png
scripts.lockfile: T=$(mktemp -d) && cp package.json $T/ && npm install --package-lock-only --prefix $T && cp $T/package-lock.json . && rm -rf $T

author: Ben Elliot <ben.elliot@nice.com>
